description: Historical audit ledger preserving all known registry audit snapshots as distinct, non-competing truth layers with explicit scope and provenance.

audit_snapshots.notes: Earliest known audit in registry history. Covers the original 3-repo ShopDrawing.AI SaaS platform and governance ecosystem. Pre-dates the Construction OS multi-repo expansion. Documents production deployment state, technology stack, and governance framework.
audit_snapshots.superseded_scope: The 2026-03-22 audit covers a broader ecosystem but does not invalidate the production deployment facts recorded here.

audit_snapshots.audit_label: Construction OS Platform Inventory — Frozen Topology
audit_snapshots.notes: Committed to main. Contains frozen_topology with dependency edges, atlas purification record, rename lineage (Construction_Atlas_UI to Construction_Atlas), and architecture status FROZEN. Serves as the canonical main-branch platform inventory. Includes repos outside the 14-repo induction set (Atlas, Chemistry, ValidKernel family, trade_os, SUPA-SAINT, ALEXANDER).

audit_snapshots.audit_label: Construction OS Full System Map — 21-Repo Architecture Audit
audit_snapshots.notes: Broadest scope audit in registry history. 21 repos audited across 8 architectural layers. Includes layer assignments, dependency graphs, contract seam inventory (5 frozen kernel-runtime seams), cognitive bus emitter policy, ALEXANDER engine pipeline, and 10 frozen architecture rules. Committed to branch claude/review-construction-system-Hn6XJ but NEVER MERGED to main. This is the most comprehensive architecture truth snapshot available.
audit_snapshots.superseded_scope: The 2026-03-29 induction is a narrower active topology subset. It does NOT supersede this broader audit for full-system reference purposes.

audit_snapshots.audit_label: Construction OS Registry Induction — Active Topology Pass
audit_snapshots.notes: Active registry topology induction pass. 14 repos induced with deterministic node IDs, 30 explicit edges (including 13 per-repo OBSERVES edges), and 5-band topology shape. Construction_Runtime classified from prior-run evidence (READY_WITH_NOTES). All other repos observed live. This is the current canonical active topology but is narrower in scope than the 2026-03-22 full system map.
audit_snapshots.superseded_scope: This induction supersedes prior audits ONLY for active topology rendering and registry node/edge truth. It does NOT supersede the 2026-03-22 full system map for broad architecture reference.
